summary: Access control features tested and fixed. Backend APIs return correct plan_status flags. Frontend correctly shows item-level locking for trial users (first 3 drills of each type accessible). Fixed bug where active trial users had all pages locked.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /app/backend/routes/resources.py where active trial users had access flags set to False (pages were blocked)
Fixed bug in /app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/DrillsPage.jsx where isDrillLocked() only checked use_item_level_locking, not is_trial flag
Backend correctly returns is_free_trial flag for first 3 drills of each type (Case Math and Case Structuring)
plan_status.show_subscription_days is correctly set to False for subscriptions (to reduce churn)
plan_status.show_coaching_days is correctly set to True for coaching programs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Access control features fully tested. Key flags: plan_status.use_item_level_locking (True for expired plans), plan_status.is_trial (True for trial users), plan_status.has_full_access (True for active paid plans). Drills API returns is_free_trial flag for first 3 drills of each type.

backend_dashboard_summary_plan_status.details: Returns correct flags: use_item_level_locking, has_full_access, is_trial, trial_expired, trial_days_remaining, show_subscription_days, show_coaching_days

backend_ai_drills_is_free_trial.details: First 3 drills of each type (Case Math, Case Structuring) have is_free_trial=true

frontend_expired_trial_page_access.details: Expired trial user can access Case Drills page (page not blocked)

frontend_drill_locking.details: First 3 drills show 'Start' button, remaining drills show 'Upgrade to access'

frontend_upgrade_modal.details: Clicking 'Upgrade to access' opens subscription plans modal with 3 plans

frontend_days_left_visibility.details: Days left shown for trial users ('4 days left'), hidden for subscription users

frontend_active_trial_access.details: Active trial users can access pages and see first 3 drills of each type

bugs_fixed.issue: Active trial users had access flags (courses, drills, etc.) set to False, blocking page access
bugs_fixed.fix: Added explicit handling for active trial users to set pages_accessible=True

bugs_fixed.issue: isDrillLocked() only checked use_item_level_locking flag, not is_trial flag
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated to check is_trial flag for both active and expired trial users
